The Intouchables

Intouchables

"Sometimes you have to reach into someone else's world to find out what's missing in your own."

8.3
2011MOVIERReleased

Synopsis

A true story of two men who should never have met – a quadriplegic aristocrat who was injured in a paragliding accident and a young man from the projects.

Tags

friendshipmale friendshipbased on true storymasseusearistocratparaglidinginterracial friendshipunlikely friendshipduringcreditsstingerquadriplegicquadriplegiafeel goodoptimisticintouchables
